FluentGpu
Table of Contents

Class ProgressBar

Namespace
FluentGpu.Controls
Assembly
FluentGpu.Controls.dll

A WinUI ProgressBar (1:1). A 3px-min band (ProgressBarMinHeight) holding a 1px track (ProgressBarTrackHeight, ControlStrongStrokeColorDefault) under an accent indicator (AccentFillColorDefaultBrush) with a 1.5px corner. Determinate(float, float, ProgressBarState, TemplateParts?) fills the indicator to a 0..1 value; Indeterminate(float, ProgressBarState, TemplateParts?) sweeps the two clipped accent indicators across the track on the looping translate keyframes WinUI binds from ProgressBarTemplateSettings (Container/Container2 positions). Paused/Error stop the sweep and settle a full-width bar at ContainerAnimationMidPosition, recolored to SystemFillColorCaution / SystemFillColorCritical (instant recolor — no fill-color anim channel).

public static class ProgressBar
Inheritance
object
ProgressBar
Inherited Members

object.ToString()

Fields

PartFill

The foreground indicator (WinUI DeterminateProgressBarIndicator, and BOTH IndeterminateProgressBarIndicator/2 — the modifier runs on each sweeping indicator). The value-driven Width and the Paused/Error recolor are stock per-render styling (override-able). Owned: OnRealized (the indeterminate sweep refs, chained with any modifier-supplied handler).

public const string PartFill = "Fill"

Field Value

string

PartTrack

The 1px under-track (WinUI ProgressBarTrack). Owned: none — its Opacity-0 in the indeterminate states is stock per-render styling a modifier may override.

public const string PartTrack = "Track"

Field Value

string

Methods

Determinate(float, float, ProgressBarState, TemplateParts?)

Determinate progress; value is clamped to 0..1, indicator width = value * width. state selects the indicator color (Normal accent / Paused caution / Error critical). parts = per-part styling keyed by PartTrack/PartFill.

public static BoxEl Determinate(float value, float width = 240, ProgressBarState state = ProgressBarState.Normal, TemplateParts? parts = null)

Parameters

value float
width float
state ProgressBarState
parts TemplateParts

Returns

BoxEl

Indeterminate(float, ProgressBarState, TemplateParts?)

Indeterminate progress: the two clipped accent indicators sweeping across the track on the WinUI ProgressBarTemplateSettings translate keyframes. In Paused/Error, the track hides and only indicator2 shows, recolored to caution/critical (matching WinUI's IndeterminatePaused / IndeterminateError visual states). parts = per-part styling keyed by PartTrack/PartFill (the PartFill modifier runs on BOTH sweeping indicators).

public static Element Indeterminate(float width = 240, ProgressBarState state = ProgressBarState.Normal, TemplateParts? parts = null)

Parameters

width float
state ProgressBarState
parts TemplateParts

Returns

Element
FluentGpu — a near-zero-allocation, NativeAOT, GPU-rendered UI engine for .NET 10. Usage docs live here; architecture canon lives in design/ (SPEC-INDEX.md is the precedence authority).
